pattern: Connectivity is fixed, so a union-find groups the stations once and each grid keeps a lazily-cleaned min-heap of its still-online members to answer smallest-online lookups quickly.
hints: The cables never change, so the grids (connected components) can be computed up front with union-find.
For each grid you need the smallest id that is still online; a min-heap per grid gives that, with offline ids skipped lazily.
On a check, if the station is online answer it directly; otherwise pop stale (offline) entries off its grid's heap until the top is online, or report -1 if the heap empties.

edge_inputs.description: a chain grid with stations going offline
smallest id offline forces fallback to next id
two separate grids do not rescue each other
online station resolves itself regardless of smaller offline ids

stress.description: random grids, interleaved offline and check queries
stress.note: mixes checks and outages so the -1 and fallback paths both fire
